npcs.name: Guild Registrar
npcs.role: registers new hunters and explains the Guild

npcs.name: Rank Examiner
npcs.role: evaluates hidden milestones and assigns public rank

npcs.name: Bounty Master
npcs.role: directs players to local and regional contracts

npcs.name: Hunter Quartermaster
npcs.role: spends Guild currency on rank-appropriate supplies

npcs.name: Weapon Appraiser
npcs.role: ties Simply Swords, Marium, Spartan Shields, and boss loot to rank identity

npcs.name: Guild Arcanist
npcs.role: explains Iron's Spells, magical threats, and corrupted areas

npcs.name: Tavern Keeper
npcs.role: shares rival sightings and local rumors

npcs.name: Guard Captain
npcs.role: connects Guard Villagers and settlement defense contracts

npcs.name: Wounded Hunter
npcs.role: encounter NPC for rescue and warning events
